task: Task 5 - recreate omo-validate-config and integrate existing shellouts

changes: Added executable CommonJS validator CLI using built-in Node APIs only.
Implemented --config, --fix, --help, default CONFIG_PATH support, field-path stderr errors, nonzero invalid exits, and concise valid/fixed stdout.

Validates top-level object, $schema, agents/categories objects, section model/variant/routing/fallback_models, fallback option objects, provider/model syntax, provider cache existence when available, local facts when available, and unknown placement option keys.

--fix only adds missing $schema, canonicalizes ollama/ refs to local/, normalizes fallback array objects to strings only when no option fields are lost, deletes empty routing/fallback_models, formats JSON, and writes a .bak backup before modifying.
Replaced unsafe line-regex JSONC stripping with scanner-based comment and trailing-comma handling that preserves // inside strings.
Extended loadProviderModels with optional non-refreshing quiet mode for validation without network or opencode refresh side effects.
Changed both validator shellouts to invoke the sibling validator via process.execPath and absolute script path.
Added rebalance validation rollback to restore BACKUP_PATH on sibling validator failure.
Updated the rollback integration regression to prove PATH fake validator is ignored and real sibling validator failures restore the prior config.

tests.invocation: node --check lib/omo-shared.js && node --check bin/omo-validate-config && node --check bin/omo-recommend-models

manual_qa.scenario: valid JSONC with comments, trailing comma, and // inside strings

manual_qa.binary_observable: fixed file contains local/tinyllama:1.1b, empty arrays removed, backup exists, EXIT_CODE:0

cleanup: Removed /tmp/omo-validator-qa-* manual QA directories after embedding fixture contents and command output in evidence artifacts.
No npm/package metadata, network fetches, or repo temp debug files were created.
Existing unrelated untracked repository files were not reverted or modified outside the scoped Task 5 files and evidence.

adversarial_classes.malformed_input: Covered invalid JSONC parse errors in node:test and invalid model refs in manual QA.
adversarial_classes.stale_state: Provider cache and config were isolated under temp HOME/XDG_CONFIG_HOME; validator uses non-refreshing cache lookup.
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: Worktree was already untracked/dirty; no unrelated revert was attempted.
adversarial_classes.misleading_success_output: All tee/manual artifacts include explicit EXIT_CODE lines.
adversarial_classes.hung_or_long_commands: No network fetches; validator uses bounded local file reads and existing short discoverLocalModels helper behavior.
adversarial_classes.flaky_tests: Tests and manual QA use temp dirs/fake HOME and do not touch the real user config.
adversarial_classes.prompt_injection_cancel_resume_repeated_: N/A for local deterministic CLI validation.

risks: Full node --test was not claimed for this task because known Task 2/3/4 failures remain outside Task 5 scope.
The validator intentionally implements the local subset this repo writes rather than the complete upstream oh-my-openagent schema.
Local model existence is enforced only when local catalog/discovery facts are available, matching the task requirement.
